ucs.title: [LLM] Qilin (Agenda) ransomware: VSS deletion + service kill chain via PsExec/WMI prelude to encryption
ucs.description: Hunts Qilin/Agenda's signature pre-encryption staging — PsExec or WMIC pushing a Rust/Go-based payload that disables AV/backup services and deletes Volume Shadow Copies before mass file encryption. This chain (T1490 + T1489 + T1021.002 + T1486) is the Qilin operator playbook documented across CrowdStrike (tracked as a Big Game Hunting eCrime affiliate), Microsoft (Agenda), and Trend Micro reporting on Synnovis/healthcare intrusions.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent_proc values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND ( (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*shadow*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*catalog*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe","taskkill.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*stop*Veeam*","*stop*MSExchange*","*stop*SQLSERVER*","*stop*BackupExec*","*/IM*sql*","*/IM*veeam*","*MpsSvc*","*WinDefend*","*Sense*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*Get-WmiObject*Win32_Shadowcopy*","*Remove-WmiObject*Win32_Shadowcopy*","*Stop-Service*Veeam*","*Set-MpPreference*DisableRealtimeMonitoring*")) ) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process _time span=1h | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | stats dc(process_name) as distinct_destructive_actions values(process_name) as actions values(process) as cmds values(parent_process_name) as parents min(firstTime) as firstTime max(lastTime) as lastTime by dest user | where distinct_destructive_actions>=2 | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// Qilin/Agenda staging — multi-action destructive chain on the same host within 1h
let Lookback = 24h;
let Window = 1h;
let DestructiveActions =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | extend Action = case(
        FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"), "VSS_DELETE",
        FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"), "VSS_DELETE",
        FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","catalog"), "BACKUP_CATALOG_DELETE",
        FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and (ProcessCommandLine has_all ("recoveryenabled","No") or ProcessCommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"), "RECOVERY_DISABLE",
        FileName in~ ("net.exe","net1.exe","sc.exe","taskkill.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Veeam","MSExchange","SQLSERVER","BackupExec","MpsSvc","WinDefend","Sense","sql","veeam"), "SVC_KILL",
        FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Win32_Shadowcopy","Stop-Service Veeam","DisableRealtimeMonitoring"), "PS_DESTRUCT",
        "");
DestructiveActions
| where isnotempty(Action)
| summarize ActionsSeen = make_set(Action),
            ActionCount = dcount(Action),
            CmdLines = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
            Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp)
          by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, Window)
| where ActionCount >= 2     // >=2 distinct destructive action classes within 1h = Qilin staging
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Qilin/Agenda destructive chain on Sentinel SecurityEvent (4688) — requires CommandLine auditing
let Lookback = 24h;
let Window = 1h;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
| extend img = tolower(NewProcessName), cmd = tolower(CommandLine)
| extend Action = case(
    img endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and cmd has_all ("delete","shadows"), "VSS_DELETE",
    img endswith "\\wmic.exe" and cmd has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"), "VSS_DELETE",
    img endswith "\\wbadmin.exe" and cmd has_all ("delete","catalog"), "BACKUP_CATALOG_DELETE",
    img endswith "\\bcdedit.exe" and (cmd has_all ("recoveryenabled","no") or cmd has "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"), "RECOVERY_DISABLE",
    (img endswith "\\net.exe" or img endswith "\\net1.exe" or img endswith "\\sc.exe" or img endswith "\\taskkill.exe") and cmd has_any ("veeam","msexchange","sqlserver","backupexec","mpssvc","windefend","sense"), "SVC_KILL",
    (img endswith "\\powershell.exe" or img endswith "\\pwsh.exe") and cmd has_any ("win32_shadowcopy","stop-service veeam","disablerealtimemonitoring"), "PS_DESTRUCT",
    "")
| where isnotempty(Action)
| summarize ActionsSeen = make_set(Action),
            ActionCount = dcount(Action),
            CmdLines = make_set(CommandLine, 25),
            Parents = make_set(ParentProcessName, 10),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
          by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, Window)
| where ActionCount >= 2
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Qilin/Agenda affiliates uniformly stage encryption with the same destructive prelude: VSS wipe + backup-service kill + Defender tamper, often pushed via PsExec or WMI from a beachhead host (per Microsoft Threat Intelligence, Group-IB, and Trend Micro Agenda reporting on Synnovis, evolved Healthcare, and US-CERT advisories). Random ransomware crews do one of these; Qilin reliably chains 2+ in a sin

ucs.title: [LLM] Qilin safe-mode reboot abuse — bcdedit /set safeboot followed by automated shutdown for tamper-resistant encryption
ucs.description: Qilin (Agenda) is one of the few crews that reliably reboots victims into Safe Mode with Networking before running the encryptor — it neutralises EDR agents that don't load in safe boot. Hunts the bcdedit safeboot toggle followed within 30 minutes by a forced reboot/shutdown on the same host, a sequence published by Sophos X-Ops and Trend Micro as an Agenda/Qilin signature distinct from BlackCat/LockBit tradecraft.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND Processes.process="*safeboot*" AND Processes.process IN ("*minimal*","*network*") by Processes.dest Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.user _time span=1m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename firstTime as safeboot_time | join type=inner dest [ | tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as reboot_time values(Processes.process) as reboot_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("shutdown.exe","cmd.exe","powershell.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*shutdown*/r*","*Restart-Computer*")) OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND Processes.process="*deletevalue*safeboot*") by Processes.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` ] | where reboot_time>=safeboot_time AND (reboot_time-safeboot_time)<=1800 | table safeboot_time reboot_time dest user cmd reboot_cmd parent | sort - safeboot_time
ucs.kql:
// Qilin/Agenda safe-mode reboot tradecraft — bcdedit safeboot toggle then forced reboot within 30m
let Lookback = 7d;
let WindowSec = 1800;
let SafeBootSet =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe"
    | where ProcessCommandLine has "safeboot" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("minimal","network")
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | project SafeBootTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              SafeBootCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
let Reboot =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where (FileName =~ "shutdown.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("/r","-r"))
         or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has "Restart-Computer")
         or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("deletevalue","safeboot"))
    | project RebootTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, RebootCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
SafeBootSet
| join kind=inner Reboot on DeviceId
| where RebootTime between (SafeBootTime .. SafeBootTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| project SafeBootTime, RebootTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', RebootTime, SafeBootTime),
          DeviceName, AccountName, SafeBootCmd, RebootCmd, Parent, ParentCmd
| order by SafeBootTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Qilin/Agenda safe-mode reboot tradecraft on Sentinel SecurityEvent (4688)
let Lookback = 7d;
let WindowSec = 1800;
let SafeBootSet =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where tolower(NewProcessName) endswith "\\bcdedit.exe"
    | where tolower(CommandLine) has "safeboot" and tolower(CommandLine) has_any ("minimal","network")
    | project SafeBootTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, SafeBootCmd = CommandLine, Parent = ParentProcessName;
let Reboot =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | extend img = tolower(NewProcessName), cmd = tolower(CommandLine)
    | where (img endswith "\\shutdown.exe" and cmd has_any ("/r","-r"))
         or ((img endswith "\\powershell.exe" or img endswith "\\pwsh.exe") and cmd has "restart-computer")
         or (img endswith "\\bcdedit.exe" and cmd has_all ("deletevalue","safeboot"))
    | project RebootTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, RebootCmd = CommandLine;
SafeBootSet
| join kind=inner Reboot on Computer
| where RebootTime between (SafeBootTime .. SafeBootTime + WindowSec * 1s)
| project SafeBootTime, RebootTime,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', RebootTime, SafeBootTime),
          Computer, Account, SafeBootCmd, RebootCmd, Parent
| order by SafeBootTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Qilin/Agenda Safe-Mode Boot Configuration
id: 7b4f9c2d-1a3e-4f8b-9c12-q1l1nagenda01
status: experimental
description: Detects bcdedit configuring safe-mode boot — Qilin/Agenda ransomware reboots victims into safe mode prior to encryption to bypass EDR.
references:
  - https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2024/08/22/qilin-ransomware-caught-stealing-credentials-stored-in-google-chrome/
  - https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/22/h/new-golang-ransomware-agenda-customizes-attacks.html
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2025/01/15
tags:
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.t1562.009
  - attack.defense_evasion
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith: '\bcdedit.exe'
  selection_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'safeboot'
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'minimal'
      - 'network'
  filter_user:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_img and selection_cmd and not filter_user
falsepositives:
  - Authorised IT recovery / OSD imaging workflows
level: high
ucs.rationale: Safe-mode reboot is one of the few public tradecraft items that distinguishes Qilin/Agenda from peer RaaS crews like Akira or BlackBasta. The original Agenda Golang variants (Trend Micro Aug-2022) and the rewritten Rust variants used by Qilin (Sophos X-Ops, Aug-2024 Synnovis writeup) both invoke `bcdedit /set {default} safeboot network` and then force a reboot so Defender/CrowdStrike services are
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
